attack.name: Attack
attack.summary: Make one melee or ranged attack, or more if a feature such as Extra Attack says so.

cast-a-spell.name: Cast a Spell
cast-a-spell.summary: Cast a spell using the casting time listed in the spell's description.

dash.name: Dash
dash.summary: Gain extra movement for the current turn equal to your speed after modifiers.

disengage.name: Disengage
disengage.summary: Your movement does not provoke opportunity attacks for the rest of the turn.

dodge.name: Dodge
dodge.summary: Until your next turn, attacks against you have disadvantage if you can see the attacker, and you have advantage on Dexterity saving throws.

help.name: Help
help.summary: Give an ally advantage on the next relevant check, or on the first attack against a creature within 5 feet of you before your next turn.

hide.name: Hide
hide.summary: Make a Dexterity (Stealth) check to hide if the circumstances allow it.

ready.name: Ready
ready.summary: Choose a perceivable trigger and an action or movement to take later with your reaction.

search.name: Search
search.summary: Devote your attention to finding something, usually with Perception or Investigation.

use-an-object.name: Use an Object
use-an-object.summary: Use an object that requires an action, or interact with more than one object on your turn.

grapple.name: Grapple
grapple.summary: Replace one attack from the Attack action with a contested Strength (Athletics) check to impose the grappled condition.

shove.name: Shove
shove.summary: Replace one attack from the Attack action with a contested Strength (Athletics) check to push a target 5 feet or knock it prone.
